intent: EMS is a cloud web app for the back-office of ONE wholesale/distribution business: products and multi-spec inventory, customers, sales orders, payments and customer credit (A/R), returns and voids, printed business documents, role-scoped staff permissions, and a full audit trail. It must be reliable enough to be trusted with the business's money and stock. It is sold as a subscription and its access is gated by an activation code. It is explicitly single-business (NOT multi-tenant) and carries nothing from any prior project.
in_scope: Products: code, name, one primary image plus additional images, spec/model, default sale price, cost price, stock qty, low-stock alert threshold.
Multi-spec inventory (variants): the same product in different sizes/models/wattages/thicknesses is tracked as SEPARATE stock; each variant carries its own stock qty and can carry its own price/cost.
Multi-warehouse data model: one main warehouse in v1, schema ready for more later; NO multi-warehouse UI in v1.
Quantities support BOTH whole units and decimal quantities per a product/variant unit-of-measure (e.g. EA vs metre/kg) [DECIDED: both].
Customers: company name, contact, phone, notes, plus a view of that customer's order history and current unpaid balance.

Sales orders: one order with many product lines; each line's sale price is editable; discount vs default is shown. Physical stock moves through an explicit RESERVE->COMMIT->FULFILL lifecycle with a SINGLE owner of on-hand movement: an open quotation RESERVES (availability = on_hand - reserved; on_hand unchanged), confirming an order COMMITS (decrements on_hand EXACTLY ONCE), and the delivery note FULFILLS (records goods physically leaving; does NOT decrement again). If the reserved/committed state of a movement is unknown or unresolvable the movement is REFUSED (fail-closed), never applied twice or blind [DECIDED: decrement on confirm; delivery note is doc+marker -> see DA-STOCKMOVE].
Payments and credit: accept cash and debit; unpaid/partly-paid orders appear as customer credit/owed (A/R); payments are tied to specific orders.
Returns and void: a return puts stock back and adjusts the books; a mistaken order is VOIDED (kept for record), never hard-deleted.
Returns on unpaid/partly-paid orders resolve as EITHER a credit note (reduces debt) OR a cash refund, user-selectable at return time [DECIDED: both, user-selectable].
Printed documents: quotation, delivery note, invoice, receipt.
Quotations HOLD/RESERVE stock while open and release the reservation on expiry/cancel/convert [DECIDED: quotes reserve stock].

Delivery note is BOTH a printable document AND the FULFILL/shipment marker recording that goods have physically left; it does NOT re-decrement stock (on_hand was already COMMITTED exactly once at order-confirm) [DECIDED: both; fulfillment marker, no second stock movement -> see DA-STOCKMOVE].

Permissions: business owner (boss) sees cost prices, profit, and all reports; staff sees only products/customers/orders/stock and MAY see customers' unpaid balances [DECIDED: staff may see unpaid balances].

Staff MAY edit line sale prices, take payments, void orders, and process returns, subject to optional configurable guardrails (below-cost block / max-discount / credit-limit override) [DECIDED: staff may do all four].
Audit trail: record who created an order, changed a price, took a payment, did a return, or performed any correction, with timestamp and (for corrections) reason and before/after values.
Cloud deployment usable from phone and computer; data stored in the cloud; LOCAL-FIRST development then staging then cloud production [DECIDED: local-first].

Subscription ACTIVATION GATE (access gate / kill-switch, NOT DRM): the business account cannot use the app unless activated with a valid activation code; permanent (revocable) and time-limited (expiring) codes; codes issued and revoked only by the software owner/admin; codes handled credential-grade.

CORRECTABLE FINANCIALS: every financial record (charges, payments, pending items, balances, invoices, credits, refunds, deposits, allocations) is correctable via controlled, permission-gated, reason-required, confirmed, fully-audited actions (void, edit/revise, reverse, re-allocate, adjust, and delete only where provably safe) that preserve the original value and keep all downstream numbers consistent.

Money: exact integer-cent arithmetic, CAD; Canadian sales tax CONFIGURABLE not hardcoded; province Ontario in v1 (13% HST); presentation supports BOTH tax-exclusive and tax-inclusive modes as a configured choice.
Document numbering is GAPLESS per document type [DECIDED: gapless].
out_of_scope: Anything carried from any other project.
Multi-warehouse UI (data model only in v1).
Full bilingual UI (English-first in v1; bilingual later).

acceptance_criteria.statement: With no code, an expired code, a revoked code, a blank code, or an unrecognized code, the business account CANNOT reach any business function; access is BLOCKED by default (fail-closed). If the activation verifier itself THROWS, TIMES OUT, or its dependency (the activation store/DB) is UNREACHABLE or otherwise unresolvable, access likewise FAILS CLOSED (BLOCKED): a verification that cannot positively prove a valid, unexpired, unrevoked code is a denial, never a pass-through.
acceptance_criteria.verifiable_by: harness:activation_gate_fixture (error-injected states none|expired|revoked|blank|unknown|valid|verifier_throw|verifier_timeout|store_unreachable all asserted; only 'valid' unblocks; every throw/timeout/unreachable case asserts BLOCKED)

acceptance_criteria.statement: Activation codes are never returned to any client, never written to logs, and never committed; only issue/revoke by the software owner/admin can create or invalidate them.
A staff-role principal cannot read cost price or profit through ANY API, query, export, or document; the value is absent at the data layer, not merely hidden in the UI.
acceptance_criteria.verifiable_by: harness:rls_cost_hidden_fixture (staff token over every read path asserts no cost/profit field returned)

acceptance_criteria.statement: A staff-role principal cannot reach any backend/database/admin surface (no direct DB, no admin API, no activation-admin).
Under N concurrent confirmations against the same variant, total stock decremented equals stock sold and never goes below zero (no oversell, no lost update).
acceptance_criteria.verifiable_by: harness:concurrency_oversell_fixture (parallel confirm; final stock reconciles; oversell rejected)

acceptance_criteria.statement: Under concurrent payments against the same order, total applied never exceeds the amount owed (no double-charge / over-allocation).

Returns and refunds are capped on two INDEPENDENT axes: cumulative GOODS returned can never exceed goods SOLD, and cumulative CASH refunded can never exceed cash actually RECEIVED for the order. Returned value above cash received resolves as a credit-note / debt-reduction, never as cash out. If the sold or cash-received basis is unknown or unresolvable the refund is REFUSED (fail-closed). No over-return, no over-refund.
acceptance_criteria.verifiable_by: harness:return_refund_cap_fixture (goods-returned<=sold AND cash-refunded<=cash-received asserted independently; excess-over-cash routed to credit-note, never cash)

acceptance_criteria.statement: For every order, the amount shown on screen equals the amount stored equals the amount printed on the document, to the cent, including Ontario tax and correct rounding.
acceptance_criteria.verifiable_by: harness:money_roundtrip_fixture (shown==stored==printed across tax-inclusive and tax-exclusive modes)

acceptance_criteria.statement: Every financial record can be corrected only through a controlled action that is permission-gated, requires a reason, is confirmed before applying, is fully audited, preserves the original value, and leaves all downstream numbers (invoice totals, stock, customer balance, reports) consistent; no silent or direct-DB edit path exists.
An issued document is never silently mutated; a correction produces a NEW superseding document that references the original, and the original remains retrievable.

A correction that partially commits and is then RETRIED is idempotent: the adjusting/reversing entry is posted EXACTLY ONCE (guarded by an idempotency key / dedup), never double-posted, and a retry after a crash mid-commit converges to the same single adjustment with all downstream numbers consistent. If exactly-once posting cannot be guaranteed the correction is REFUSED (fail-closed) rather than risk a double-post.
acceptance_criteria.verifiable_by: harness:correction_idempotency_fixture (partial-commit then retry asserts a single adjusting entry; no double-post; downstream numbers consistent)

acceptance_criteria.statement: A voided order is retained for record (not hard-deleted) and its stock/financial effects are reversed exactly once.
Document numbers within a type are gapless: no gaps and no duplicates even under concurrency and rollback.
acceptance_criteria.verifiable_by: harness:gapless_numbering_fixture (parallel issue + forced rollback; sequence dense and unique)

acceptance_criteria.statement: An order that would push a customer over their credit limit is BLOCKED (hard stop), overridable only by a permitted role with an audited override.
For every create/price-change/payment/return/correction the audit trail records who, what, when, and (for corrections) why and before/after; audit records are append-only.
acceptance_criteria.verifiable_by: harness:audit_trail_fixture (append-only; required fields present per action type)

assumptions: Single legal business entity; one main warehouse operational in v1.

Deployment target is Next.js (App Router) + TypeScript with Supabase (Postgres + Auth + Storage) as the REAFFIRMED-BUT-RATIFIABLE stack (see DESIGN_AUTHORITY_DECISION_SHEET DA-STACK); any managed Postgres with row-level authorization satisfies the same constraints.
Ontario tax = 13% HST in v1; rates and mode are configuration, not code.
Independent financial audit (Raphael + external) gates trust in any AI-authored financial logic before it is relied upon.
All development begins local, then staging, then cloud production.
open_questions: DA-COSTBASIS: profit cost basis (cost-at-sale-time vs weighted-average vs FIFO) is UNPICKED; proceeding on a SWAPPABLE-basis default with the choice confirmed at a later gate. High-impact but not blocking planning.
DA-TAXMODE: tax-inclusive vs tax-exclusive default presentation for Ontario (both supported; default to confirm).
DA-STAFFGUARD: whether the below-cost block and max-discount cap are ON by default and at what threshold.
DA-CREDITOVERRIDE: which role may override a credit-limit block.
DA-QUOTEEXPIRY: quotation validity/expiry window that releases the stock reservation.
DA-TAXEXEMPT: whether tax-exempt customers are supported in v1.
DA-DECIMALPREC: decimal precision per unit-of-measure for decimal-quantity products.
